message:
feat(obs): connection-pool validator with workload-aware recommendations

Adds a new `connection_pool` submodule in fsqlite-observability that
captures best-practice guidance for SQLite connection pools and ships a
telemetry-driven validator. The surface is re-exported at the crate
root so downstream consumers depend on it through the observability
facade rather than the submodule path.

New module (`src/connection_pool.rs`, 749 lines)
------------------------------------------------
* `ConnectionPoolWorkloadProfile` — {ReadHeavy, Mixed, WriteHeavy},
  used to bias pool-sizing guidance for the three canonical workload
  shapes.
* `ConnectionLifecycleSnapshot` — per-connection point-in-time summary
  covering `connection_id`, `age_ms`, `idle_ms`, `open_transactions`,
  `active_snapshot_age_ms`, `queries_executed`, `prepare_calls`. This
  is the granular input the validator walks to detect leaks and
  long-running snapshots.
* `ConnectionPoolTelemetrySample` — aggregate input with workload
  profile, `cpu_cores`, `configured_pool_size`,
  `observed_active_connections`, `peak_concurrent_checkout_requests`,
  and the list of per-connection lifecycle snapshots.
* `ConnectionPoolValidator` / `ConnectionPoolValidatorConfig` — runs
  the checks and produces a `ConnectionPoolValidationReport` containing
  `ConnectionPoolFinding`s (each with a `ConnectionPoolSeverity` and a
  `ConnectionPoolPattern` tag), a `ConnectionPoolHealth` rollup, a
  `ConnectionPoolSummary`, and ranked `ConnectionPoolRecommendation`s.
* `ConnectionPoolBestPractice` catalogue exposed via
  `connection_pool_best_practices()` so callers can enumerate the
  canonical guidance independently of a specific telemetry sample.
* Top-level `validate_connection_pool()` convenience wrapper over the
  validator, matching the same call shape downstream beads already use
  for other observability validators.

Re-exports in `src/lib.rs`
--------------------------
All of the above are re-exported from the crate root alongside the
existing `PageCacheEfficiencySnapshot` export, so consumers can
`use fsqlite_observability::{ConnectionPoolValidator, ...};` directly.

fsqlite-vdbe/src/engine.rs
--------------------------
Removes the dead `has_register_subtypes` helper left behind by the
cold-state migration. After that migration every caller reads
`cold_state.has_subtypes` through a different code path and the helper
was no longer referenced. Pure dead-code cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
